name: SP8192 BPB-Weighted Loss + Easy-Chunk TTT + Late Loop Onset
author: Artem Buldin
technique_summary: SP8192 + late loop onset at step 2600 + pass-gated recurrence + easy-chunk legal TTT + raw byte-weighted train loss + control-int8 packing
notes: Negative single-seed experiment. Quantized serialization completed, but the total submission size was 16,068,552 bytes and the train-side quality regressed sharply. The reported val_bpb is the final pre-quantization post-EMA result because later quantized metrics were not completed in the preserved log.
